name: skill-monitoring
description: CI pipeline for skills — routing audit, model canary, weekly eval, degradation detection. Prevents silent skill regression in production.

capabilities.routing_audit: Log every skill selection with confidence scores, detect confusion (delta < 0.05)
capabilities.model_canary: Before model updates, run skills against synthetic inputs, diff structurally
capabilities.weekly_eval: Judge model scores skill outputs on rubric, alert on 10%+ week-over-week drops
capabilities.degradation_detection: Compare first-half vs second-half invocation scores, flag >10% drops
capabilities.version_control: Every skill amendment gets audit entry with before/after scores

failure_modes.routing_confusion: Delta < 0.05 between top candidates — add disambiguation keywords
failure_modes.model_drift: Format changes on model updates — test structurally, not semantically
failure_modes.reference_breakage: Outdated test cases — refresh benchmarks when codebase changes

rules: Every routing decision logged to skill_audit.jsonl
10+ invocations required before degradation check triggers
All monitoring is deterministic — no LLM for evaluation scoring
